raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.3,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should the look focus on writing polish only, or on substantive research-review issues such as argument strength and claim support?","rationale":{"R1.6":"The delegation refers to looking at a paragraph, which most directly implies sentence- and paragraph-level writing review.","RX.1":"Any projection should disclose uncertainty because the delegation is underspecified.","RX.2":"The projection should avoid inferring stronger requested responsibilities than the vague instruction supports.","RX.3":"The agent must stay within projecting responsibilities rather than editing or evaluating the artifact itself.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid enabling misleading treatment of benchmark or bias claims beyond the requested scope.","RX.5":"The projection should preserve traceability from the vague delegation and paragraph artifact to the assigned responsibility weights."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Should the look focus on writing polish only, or on substantive research-review issues such as argument strength and claim support?

rationale.R1.6: The delegation refers to looking at a paragraph, which most directly implies sentence- and paragraph-level writing review.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection should disclose uncertainty because the delegation is underspecified.
rationale.RX.2: The projection should avoid inferring stronger requested responsibilities than the vague instruction supports.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must stay within projecting responsibilities rather than editing or evaluating the artifact itself.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid enabling misleading treatment of benchmark or bias claims beyond the requested scope.
rationale.RX.5: The projection should preserve traceability from the vague delegation and paragraph artifact to the assigned responsibility weights.
